# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/build-pico2
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/cmake/v3.31.5/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-addr2line.exe

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar.exe

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:STRING=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ar.exe

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ranlib.exe

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=-mcpu=cortex-m33 -mthumb -march=armv8-m.main+fp+dsp -mfloat-abi=softfp -mcmse

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-Og -g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-g -Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-g -O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Disable package configuration, target export and installation
DISABLE_PACKAGE_CONFIG_AND_INSTALL:BOOL=ON

//Dot tool for use with Doxygen
DOXYGEN_DOT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_DOT_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Doxygen documentation generation tool (https://www.doxygen.nl)
DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=DOXYGEN_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Build Mbed TLS programs.
ENABLE_PROGRAMS:BOOL=OFF

//Build Mbed TLS tests.
ENABLE_TESTING:BOOL=OFF

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/build-pico2/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Generate the auto-generated files as needed
GEN_FILES:BOOL=OFF

//Install Mbed TLS headers.
INSTALL_MBEDTLS_HEADERS:BOOL=ON

//Explicitly link Mbed TLS library to pthread.
LINK_WITH_PTHREAD:BOOL=OFF

//Explicitly link Mbed TLS library to trusted_storage.
LINK_WITH_TRUSTED_STORAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Mbed TLS config file (overrides default).
MBEDTLS_CONFIG_FILE:FILEPATH=

//Compiler warnings treated as errors
MBEDTLS_FATAL_WARNINGS:BOOL=ON

//Mbed TLS user config file (appended to default).
MBEDTLS_USER_CONFIG_FILE:FILEPATH=

//Value Computed by CMake
Mbed TLS_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/build-pico2/libraries/mbedtls

//Value Computed by CMake
Mbed TLS_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Mbed TLS_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/libraries/mbedtls

//PICO target board (e.g. pico, pico2)
PICO_BOARD:STRING=pico2

//PICO board header directories
PICO_BOARD_HEADER_DIRS:STRING=

//Build HTML Doxygen docs
PICO_BUILD_DOCS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
PICO_COMPILER_CC:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe

//Path to a program.
PICO_COMPILER_CXX:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++.exe

//Default binaries to copy code to RAM when booting from flash
PICO_COPY_TO_RAM:BOOL=OFF

//Include debug info in release builds
PICO_DEBUG_INFO_IN_RELEASE:BOOL=ON

//boot stage 2 short name
PICO_DEFAULT_BOOT_STAGE2:STRING=compile_time_choice

//Build debug builds with -O0
PICO_DEOPTIMIZED_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Default binaries to not not use flash
PICO_NO_FLASH:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
PICO_OBJCOPY:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-objcopy.exe

//Path to a program.
PICO_OBJDUMP:FILEPATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/toolchain/14_2_Rel1/bin/arm-none-eabi-objdump.exe

//PICO Build platform (e.g. rp2040, rp2350, rp2350-riscv,  host)
PICO_PLATFORM:STRING=rp2350-arm-s

//Set to ON to fetch copy of SDK from git if not otherwise locatable
PICO_SDK_FETCH_FROM_GIT:BOOL=

//location to download SDK
PICO_SDK_FETCH_FROM_GIT_PATH:FILEPATH=

//release tag for SDK
PICO_SDK_FETCH_FROM_GIT_TAG:FILEPATH=

//Path to the Raspberry Pi Pico SDK
PICO_SDK_PATH:PATH=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0

//Globally enable stdio RTT
PICO_STDIO_RTT:BOOL=OFF

//Globally enable stdio semi-hosting
PICO_STDIO_SEMIHOSTING:BOOL=OFF

//Globally enable stdio UART
PICO_STDIO_UART:BOOL=ON

//Globally enable stdio USB
PICO_STDIO_USB:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
Python3_EXECUTABLE:STRING=c:/Users/janeg/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python39/python.exe

//Allow unsafe builds. These builds ARE NOT SECURE.
UNSAFE_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Build Mbed TLS shared library.
USE_SHARED_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY:BOOL=OFF

//Build Mbed TLS static library.
USE_STATIC_MBEDTLS_LIBRARY:BOOL=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
WIZNET-PICO-C_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/build-pico2

//Value Computed by CMake
WIZNET-PICO-C_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
WIZNET-PICO-C_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C

//Dependencies for the target
mbedcrypto_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;everest;general;p256m;

//Dependencies for the target
mbedtls_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;mbedx509;

//Dependencies for the target
mbedx509_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;mbedcrypto;

pico_sdk_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/dev/WIZnet-PICO-C/build-pico2/pico-sdk

//Value Computed by CMake
pico_sdk_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
pico_sdk_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0

on/hardware_irq;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_pio;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_pll;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_pwm;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_resets;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_spi;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_sync;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_sync_spin_lock;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_ticks;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_timer;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_uart;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_vreg;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_watchdog;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_xip_cache;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_xosc;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_powman;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_riscv_platform_timer;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_sha256;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_dcp;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/hardware_rcp;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/boot_bootrom_headers;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_platform_common;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_platform_compiler;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_platform_sections;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_platform_panic;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_aon_timer;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_bootrom;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_bootsel_via_double_reset;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_multicore;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/src/rp2_common/pico_unique_id;C:/Users/janeg/.pico-sdk/sdk/2.2.0/
